build_system: npm with tsc for compilation, CDK CLI for synthesis
test_framework: Jest 30 with ts-jest transform and aws-cdk-lib/assertions (Template.fromStack, Match)
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx jest --no-cache (all tests pass). 2. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx cdk synth (succeeds without error). 3. Snapshot test updates automatically via --updateSnapshot if needed.
snapshot_or_generated_files: test/__snapshots__/cdk-base.test.ts.snap - regenerated by running NODE_OPTIONS="" npx jest --no-cache -u
environment_constraints: NODE_OPTIONS must be set to empty string for all npm/node commands due to sandbox proxy bootstrap module. Network mode is COMMON_DEPENDENCIES - package registries accessible.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then minimal implementation. Conventional commits required. ARCHITECTURE.md must be updated with any infrastructure changes including Mermaid diagram. Prefer L2/L3 CDK constructs. Follow least-privilege IAM. Run tests + synth before committing.
key_patterns: Single stack in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts with all constructs. Tests in test/cdk-base.test.ts using Template.fromStack() assertions. State machine built with CDK tasks.* wrappers. Error handling uses addCatch(markFailedTask, {resultPath: '$.errorInfo'}). Snapshot test at end of test file. Lambda in lambda/audio-processor/index.ts.
directory_structure: bin/ - CDK app entry. lib/ - Stack definitions (cdk-base-stack.ts main, pipeline-stack.ts CD). test/ - Jest tests. lambda/audio-processor/ - Lambda handler. .github/workflows/ci.yml - CI config.
